purpose: DUA-safe aggregate eICU retrospective outcome-proxy validation matrix.
cohort_file_policy: Local-only ERA-format eICU cohort. Do not commit or publish row-level data.
event_definition: Outcome-proxy event labels from eICU mortality/discharge status fields using relative ICU offset timing.
claim_guardrail: Frame as cross-dataset retrospective outcome-proxy evaluation, not direct deterioration-event validation or prospective validation.

runs.validation_status: DUA-safe aggregate eICU outcome-proxy validation run
runs.claim_guardrail: Outcome-proxy retrospective check only; not direct deterioration-event validation.

runs.validation_status: DUA-safe aggregate eICU outcome-proxy validation run
runs.claim_guardrail: Outcome-proxy retrospective check only; not direct deterioration-event validation.

runs.validation_status: DUA-safe aggregate eICU outcome-proxy validation run
runs.claim_guardrail: Outcome-proxy retrospective check only; not direct deterioration-event validation.

public_policy: Aggregate metrics only. No raw eICU files, row-level exports, real identifiers, synthetic case IDs, or exact row-level timestamps.
notice: Decision support only. Retrospective aggregate analysis only. Not intended to diagnose, direct treatment, replace clinician judgment, or independently trigger escalation.

interpretation_guidance.main_question: Does ERA threshold behavior remain directionally understandable on a second ICU dataset using outcome-proxy events?

comparison.directional_pattern: t=4.0 should be interpreted as higher-detection/high-acuity; t=6.0 as conservative low-burden review queue.

interpretation_guidance.caution: This is retrospective outcome-proxy testing, not prospective clinical validation.
